description: A screenshot of a Daily Caller News Foundation web article rather than an agency-designed graphic. The layout shows a bold black serif/slab headline 'EXCLUSIVE: Trump Admin Relaunches Office For Victims Of Immigrant Crime That Biden Shuttered' across the top on a white background. Below it is a color press photograph of DHS Secretary Kristi Noem speaking into a microphone, mouth open mid-speech, with long highlighted hair and a dark sleeveless top; a circular white '+' expand icon overlays the top-right of the photo and the credit 'Scott Olson/Getty Images' sits beneath it. At the bottom is the 'DAILY CALLER NEWS FOUNDATION' masthead with red bracket marks. This is a reposted media screenshot used by DHS to amplify favorable press coverage of the VOICE office relaunch; the messaging frames the administration as champions of crime victims and contrasts it with the prior administration. Minimal custom DHS design, so marked not a designed meme. Target audience: general public and supporters.
notable_text: EXCLUSIVE: Trump Admin Relaunches Office For Victims Of Immigrant Crime That Biden Shuttered; DAILY CALLER NEWS FOUNDATION
